name: extractor emits an empty array (not an error) when the PR has no extractable patterns from review comments
command: printf '{"number":99,"diff":"trivial whitespace","comments":[]}\n' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/extract-patterns.sh" --pr pr.json --dry-run --out patterns.json 2>out.txt && [ "$(cat patterns.json)" = "[]" ] && grep -q 'patterns=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
